tweets.text:
Amazon made more money hosting the fake than removing it.

So they kept it up.

This is happening to thousands of brands and creators every single day.

Most don't even know it yet.

Realizing that common sense is not that common.

Nobody really tells u that when u start ur biz.

U think the hard part is the product and the competition.

Then u hire ur first 5 people and realize the hardest part is just getting grown adults to complete basic tasks.

Being a

Every person u pay $100K should be generating $200K+.

If they're not paying themselves off, they shouldn't be there.
